title: MBA / PGDM Jobs 2026 – Junior Assistant, Engineer and More
org: Anywhere in India and abroad - Head Office New Delhi/Gurugram, Regional Offices at Chennai, Vadodara, Kolkata, Branch Office at Mumbai, Inspection Offices and Construction Sites
shortInfo: The Engineers India Limited (EIL) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 22 Junior Assistant, Engineer and More Posts. Candidates with B.B.A, B.Sc, B.Tech/B.E, Diploma, MBA/PGDM Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 09-05-2026, and closes on 01-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through EIL website, engineersindia.com.

basic_details.job_title: EIL Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 22 Junior Assistant, Engineer and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Anywhere in India and abroad - Head Office New Delhi/Gurugram, Regional Offices at Chennai, Vadodara, Kolkata, Branch Office at Mumbai, Inspection Offices and Construction Sites
basic_details.short_information: The Engineers India Limited (EIL) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 22 Junior Assistant, Engineer and More Posts. Candidates with B.B.A, B.Sc, B.Tech/B.E, Diploma, MBA/PGDM Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 09-05-2026, and closes on 01-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through EIL website, engineersindia.com.

how_to_apply: Latest passport size colour photograph in .jpg/.jpeg format (not more than 75 KB)
Signature in .jpg/.jpeg format (not more than 25 KB)
Date of birth proof — Class X Certificate/Marksheet in .jpg/.jpeg format
Certificate/valid documentary proof regarding pay scale (as per Note 3/Note 4 on page 11 of notification) uploaded along with experience documents
Disability certificate (PwD) in .jpg/.jpeg/.pdf format (not more than 500 KB)
Caste certificate — OBC/SC/ST/EWS certificate, if applicable, in .jpg/.jpeg/.pdf format (not more than 500 KB)
important_instructions: This is a Special Recruitment Drive for SC, ST & OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) candidates only.
Only Full Time Regular courses will be considered (except CA/CMA/CS). The specified qualification should have been acquired within the prescribed minimum course duration.
The cut-off date for qualification, experience, and upper age is 30.04.2026.
A candidate can apply for one position only. Multiple applications will result in the latest being retained; older applications will be rejected without notice.
Applications once submitted cannot be withdrawn. No cancellation/withdrawal requests shall be entertained.
OBC-NCL certificate must be in Central format and valid as on the closing date (25.05.2026). Applications without valid OBC-NCL certificate will be rejected.

Candidates working in PSU/Govt. Sector must forward their application through proper channel or submit NOC from present employer at the time of interview/skill test. Failure to do so will result in cancellation of candidature and no TA shall be paid.
Candidates from PSUs/Govt. Sector must have completed minimum 1 year of service in the immediate lower pay scale as on date of submission of application.
Applicant should essentially have proficiency in computers.
Failure to submit supporting work experience documents will render claim of experience invalid and make the candidate ineligible from further consideration.
PwD candidates — persons with 40% or more permanent nature of disability only are eligible to apply under PwD category.
Furnishing of wrong/false information will be a disqualification and EIL will not be responsible for any consequences thereof.
EIL reserves the right to cancel the advertisement and/or the selection process without assigning any reason.
Court of jurisdiction for any dispute will be at Delhi.
Candidates are advised to visit https://www.engineersindia.com regularly for all updates regarding the recruitment process.

click_here.text: Download EIL Special Recruitment Drive 2026 Official Notification PDF

faq.question: How many vacancies are there in EIL Special Recruitment Drive 2026?
faq.answer: Engineers India Limited has announced 22 vacancies across 15 posts under the Special Recruitment Drive for SC, ST and OBC (NCL) candidates through Advertisement No. HRD/Rectt./Advt./2026-27/04.

faq.question: What are the online application dates for EIL Special Recruitment Drive 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window opens on 09 May 2026 (00:00 hrs) and closes on 01 June 2026 (23:59 hrs) on the EIL recruitment portal.

faq.question: Which categories are eligible to apply for EIL Special Recruitment Drive 2026?
faq.answer: This EIL recruitment is a Special Recruitment Drive exclusively for SC, ST and OBC (Non‑Creamy Layer) candidates, and applications from other categories will not be considered.

faq.question: What posts are available in EIL Special Recruitment Drive 2026?
faq.answer: The notification includes posts such as Senior Manager (Projects/Electrical), Manager (HR), Engineer (various disciplines), Jr. Draftsman (Process/Civil/Piping/Civil‑Structural) and Junior Assistant Grade‑III (HR & Hospitality).

faq.question: What is the selection process for EIL Special Recruitment Drive 2026?
faq.answer: EIL will shortlist candidates based on eligibility and call them for Interview (for Senior Manager/Manager/Engineer) and Skill Test (for Jr. Draftsman and Junior Assistant posts), and only shortlisted candidates will be informed via email.

faq.question: What is the pay scale and approximate CTC in EIL Special Recruitment Drive 2026?
faq.answer: The pay scales range from Rs. 90,000–2,40,000 for Senior Manager, Rs. 80,000–2,20,000 for Manager, Rs. 60,000–1,80,000 for Engineer, and Rs. 25,000/26,500–1,15,000 for Jr. Draftsman/Junior Assistant, with approximate CTC going up to about Rs. 30.29 lakh per annum for Senior Manager.

faq.question: What is the eligibility cut-off date for age, qualification and experience in EIL SRD 2026?
faq.answer: For this Special Recruitment Drive, 30 April 2026 is the cut‑off date for calculating upper age, minimum educational qualifications and required post‑qualification experience.

faq.question: Can candidates apply for more than one post in EIL Special Recruitment Drive 2026?
faq.answer: No, each candidate can apply for only one position; in case of multiple applications, the latest submitted application will be treated as final and the rest will be rejected without notice.
